---
name: OCR quality issue
about: Report poor OCR or document extraction quality
title: "[OCR] "
labels: ocr, quality
assignees: ""
---

## Problem document type

- PDF scan
- Mixed PDF
- PDF with text layer
- DOCX

## What went wrong?

Describe the OCR or Markdown quality issue.

## Expected text

If possible, paste a short corrected excerpt.

## Sample

Do not upload private documents. Use an anonymized or synthetic sample.

## Reader output

Paste the relevant Markdown excerpt.
